title: coreopsis celendinensis
intro: Coreopsis celendinensis, also known as Yellow Treasures or Coreopsis, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Coreopsis celendinensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Coreopsis celendinensis are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
